severity.description: Severity of the alert. Should be an integer between [0-4]. Value of 0 is severest.

autoMitigate.description: The value that indicates whether the alert should be automatically resolved or not. The default is Disable.

DependenciesSignalDefinition.description: Aggregate signal definition with dependent child entities

values.name: WorstOf
values.description: Default behavior: Worst child health state is propagated.

values.name: Thresholds
values.description: Based on configurable thresholds.

degradedThreshold.description:
Degraded threshold for aggregating the propagated health state of child dependencies.
Can be either an absolute number that is greater than 0, or a percentage between 1-100%.
The entity will be considered degraded when the number of not healthy child dependents (unhealthy, degraded, unknown) is equal to or above the threshold value. Must only be set when AggregationType is 'Thresholds'.

unhealthyThreshold.description:
Unhealthy threshold for aggregating the propagated health state of child dependencies.
Can be either an absolute number that is greater than 0, or a percentage between 1-100%.
The entity will be considered unhealthy when the number of not healthy child dependents (unhealthy, degraded, unknown) is equal to or above the threshold value. Must only be set when AggregationType is 'Thresholds'.

scopes.description: The scope(s) for a discovery configuration.

filterQuery.description: The ARG filter query that should be applied on the discovery scope.

dependentEntitiesStatus.description: The health evaluation results will be included here in futureThe dependent entities health status.

degradedRule.description: The signal threshold rule for the degraded state.

unhealthyRule.description: The signal threshold rule for the unhealthy state.

groupBy.description: The group by property name. Allowed values are: resource top level properties.
